free_text: Total neutron cross sections of Eu-151, Eu-153 and
Eu natural in the energy range 0.0036 To 1 eV.
2 types of spectrometers. One has a
rotor of pertinax 160 mm in diam., with a straight slit
of 1 * 25 mm2  and the other has a rotor of the same
dimentions but with a cigar-shaped slit.
flight path, 8.1m for straight and 4.2m for cigar
The purchase of the samples(enriched and spec pure
oxide) was financed by IAEA (contract NDT/21/01).
data as priv.comm. from m.Adib, Dec. 1980.
SD. Converted to new date formalism.
BIB section updated. Data in Subent was corrected.
oxide enriched sample.  Enrichment of Eu-151 is 96.83%

magnetic scattering cross-section of Eu(+++) were
subtracted from the oxide data. Eu-153 contribution was

The oxygen cross section and the calculated para-
magnetic scattering cross-section of Eu(+++) were

Spec pure,99.999%, Eu(2)-O(3) powder packed into a
steel container with thin glass windows.
The oxygen and paramagnetic scattering were subtracted
due to oxygen and paramagnetic scattering.
using the single level Breit-Wigner formula, the
